title: Review the autodialectics project against its own architecture
description: Use the repository itself as evidence and assess the runtime, recursive language model exploration, dialectical planning, verification, and evolution flow.
objectives: Inspect the contract, exploration, dialectic, execution, evaluation, routing, and evolution code paths.
Explain where the current implementation matches or diverges from the target autodialectic process.
Ground all findings in repository evidence and acknowledge environment-dependent behavior.
constraints: Ground claims in the provided repository assets only.
Do not invent tests, logs, files, or benchmark outcomes.
Explicitly separate confirmed behavior from inference.
acceptance_criteria: The output references recursive language-model exploration, dialectical planning, and GEPA evolution.
The output distinguishes grounded facts from inferences.
The run completes without raising an exception.
